chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1573 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on CMA No.8578/2025 2. For order on office objection 3. For hearing of Misc. No.7914/2025 4. For hearing of main case 02.05.2025 Petitioner, Sheeraz Ali Solangi, is present in person 1. Granted. 2-4. The petitioner, admittedly bereft of locus standi has filed this petition seeking direction to the respondents to issue a procurement policy in respect of wheat. Further directions are sought for the official respondents to start procurement of wheat. In addition to the lack of locus standi this is prima facie a policy matter and learned counsel remained unable to assist as to how any jurisdiction can be entertained by this court in this matter. Petition found to be misconceived is dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Amjad
